mapper.select: select id, name, polygon, status, create_time from no_parking_area where status = 1 order by id desc

select count(*) from no_parking_area
and name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into no_parking_area (name, polygon, status, create_time) values (#{name}, #{polygon}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
update no_parking_area
name = #{name},
polygon = #{polygon},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
